title: Coke Making
point: Conversion of coking coal into metallurgical coke.

title: Coke Making Chain
point: Starts at wagon tippler unloading and ends at coke sizing.

title: Coal Formation
point: Buried vegetation under heat and pressure forms coal.

title: Peat Formation
point: Initial decay of vegetation produces peat.

title: Lignite Formation
point: Peat converts to lignite after water removal.

title: Bituminous Coal
point: Continuous compaction converts lignite to bituminous coal.

title: Coal Formation Time
point: Coal formation takes millions of years.

title: Coal Types
point: Coals are classified into coking and non-coking coals.

title: PCC
point: Prime Coking Coal is an indigenous coking coal.

title: MCC
point: Medium Coking Coal is an indigenous coking coal.

title: HCC
point: Hard Coking Coal is an imported coking coal.

title: SCC
point: Soft Coking Coal is an imported coking coal.

title: PCC Source
point: Bhojudih is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Sudamdih is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Munidih is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Patherdih is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Dugda is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Mahuda is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Chasnala is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Jamadoba is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Bhelatand is a source of PCC.

title: PCC Source
point: Madhuban is a source of PCC.

title: MCC Source
point: Kathara is a source of MCC.

title: MCC Source
point: Swang is a source of MCC.

title: MCC Source
point: Rajrappa is a source of MCC.

title: MCC Source
point: Kedla is a source of MCC.

title: MCC Source
point: Nandan is a source of MCC.

title: Hard Coal Source
point: Mozambique Benga supplies hard coking coal.

title: Ash Rule
point: Lower ash percentage indicates better coal.

title: Indian Coal
point: Indian coal generally contains high ash.

title: Coal Beneficiation
point: Washeries reduce ash content before coke making.

title: Volatile Matter
point: Volatile matter escapes as gas during carbonization.

title: FSI
point: Free Swelling Index measures volume increase on heating.

title: FSI Alias
point: FSI is also called Crucible Swelling Number.

title: LTGK
point: Assesses caking properties and by-product yield.

title: Fluidity Use
point: Used to judge compatibility of blend coals.

title: Moisture Trend
point: Inherent moisture decreases with increasing coal rank.

title: MMR
point: Mean Max Reflectance determines coal rank.

title: MMR Relation
point: MMR is directly proportional to coke strength.

title: Coke Importance
point: Coke is a major raw material for iron extraction.

title: Coke Quality
point: Blast furnace success depends on coke quality.

title: Wagon Tippler
point: Wagons are rotated up to 172 degrees.

title: Coal Segregation
point: Different coal grades must be stacked separately.

title: Coal Mix-Up
point: Mixing coal grades is highly detrimental.

title: Coal Reclaiming
point: Coal yard material is reclaimed by reclaimer.

title: Large Particles
point: Ash-rich particles are usually greater than 5 mm.

title: Crushing Index
point: Target is 80 to 82 percent below 3.2 mm.

title: Bulk Density
point: Compactness of coal charge in oven.

title: Bulk Density Effect
point: Higher bulk density gives stronger coke.

title: Blending
point: Mixing different coals to obtain desired quality.

title: Blending Need
point: Combines advantages of indigenous and imported coals.

title: Carbonization
point: Heating coal in absence of air.

title: Stamp Charge Battery
point: Rammed coal cake pushed into oven.

title: Quenching
point: Cooling of hot coke after pushing.

title: Spot Quenching
point: Manual cooling of remaining hot coke.

title: Blast Furnace Coke Size
point: More than 25 mm and less than 80 mm.

title: Hot Strength
point: CRI and CSR indicate hot strength.

title: Coal Chemicals
point: By-products recovered from coke oven gas.

title: COG Impurities
point: Tar fog ammonia naphthalene H2S benzol.

title: Gas Cleaning
point: Uses coolers condensers washers and scrubbers.

title: Exhauster Failure
point: Causes raw gas venting to atmosphere.

title: TDP Products
point: Tar pitch PCM naphthalene anthracene oil.

title: ISO 45001:2018
point: Occupational Health and Safety Management System.

title: ISO 45001 Scope
point: Not focused on end-user product safety.
